name: leavemanagement

scripts.build:hr: npm --prefix ./leaf-servers/leave-management-mcp run build && npm --prefix ./leaf-servers/payroll-mcp run build && node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p ./apps/hr-domain-orchestrator-mcp/tsconfig.json
scripts.build:audit: npm --prefix ./leaf-servers/engagement-manager-mcp run build && npm --prefix ./leaf-servers/guided-assurance-mcp run build && node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p ./apps/cloud-audit-suite-orchestrator-mcp/tsconfig.json
scripts.build: npm run build:hr && npm run build:audit
scripts.check: npm run check:hr && npm run check:audit

description: Workspace shell for the LeaveManagement MCP domain and leaf packages
